why_selected: Graduate Student Researcher pay scales provide the core research-labor benchmark for student-worker compensation in the 2024-25 UC pay structure.

why_selected: Teaching Assistant Group 1 scales capture represented instructional student labor outside the highest-cost campuses in the 2024-25 UC pay structure.
